source_excerpt: Total net sales were $383,285 million in fiscal 2023, compared to $394,328 million in fiscal 2022.
notes: Computed decline: (383,285 − 394,328) / 394,328 = −11,043 / 394,328 ≈ −2.80%, which matches the claimed ~2.8% decline. Both the direction and magnitude are fully supported by the source figures.
